author: David Monnom
description: Track and manage GitHub pull request reviews directly from Obsidian. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

manifest.author: David Monnom
manifest.description: Track and manage GitHub pull request reviews.
manifest.name: Github PR Tracker

name: Github PR Tracker

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
What's new in v1.2.0

  **New features**

  - Filter bar: a search input at the top of the panel lets you instantly filter PRs by title, repository, author, or target branch. Powered by
  useDeferredValue so typing never blocks the UI.
  - Target branch: each PR row now shows the base branch (e.g. → 16.0) between the repo name and PR number.
  - Native header actions: the Add (+) and Refresh all buttons have moved from the panel body into Obsidian's view title bar, next to the ···
  menu. Keeps the panel cleaner and consistent with other Obsidian views.

  **Improvements**

  - Filter search index is pre-computed per entry (not on every keystroke), making filtering efficient even with large PR lists.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
**Refactored:** component tree now uses Context API instead of prop drilling - reduces coupling and makes it easier to add shared state going forward.

**Added:** comment count badge on each PR card, so reviewers can gauge discussion volume at a glance.

**Added:** inline code diff viewer - no need to leave the page to see changes size.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
Prevent error in obsidian CI

- **Error**: Found 3 dynamic `<script>` element creations
- Dynamically injecting script elements can load and execute arbitrary external code.

Use react 18 instead of 19.
